2026-04-22T15:21:39.3753662Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-22T15:21:39.3754204Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-22T15:21:39.3754633Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-22T15:21:39.3755018Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-22T15:21:39.3755346Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T15:21:39.3755588Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T15:21:39.3755747Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-22T15:21:39.3755929Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T15:21:39.3756099Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-22T15:21:39.3756336Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-22T15:21:39.3756826Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-22T15:21:39.3757103Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion).
